channel.title: mrs.space.cadet TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from mrs.space.cadet

item.title: And it’s of course my unmotivated current self who received the pull-up bar delivery over the weekend. Time for day 1 of a 12 week pull-up program 😑
item.description: And it’s of course my unmotivated current self who received the pull-up bar delivery over the weekend. Time for day 1 of a 12 week pull-up program 😑

item.title: This was an absolute disaster but I did it. It can only get better from here, right? RIGHT?! I’ve never wanted to quit something so fast but I’m taking that as a sign I need to stick with it. Follow along to watch me become insufferable as soon as I can d
item.description: This was an absolute disaster but I did it. It can only get better from here, right? RIGHT?! I’ve never wanted to quit something so fast but I’m taking that as a sign I need to stick with it. Follow along to watch me become insufferable as soon as I can d

item.title: Watch your pace with these shoes I think they put mini rockets in them or something
item.description: Watch your pace with these shoes I think they put mini rockets in them or something

item.title: @Craig Conover thinks I hustled him. I guess we’ll never know 🙂‍↔️
item.description: @Craig Conover thinks I hustled him. I guess we’ll never know 🙂‍↔️

item.title: I forgot to show my palms but add arrows for those as well 😩 the program I’m following is called Pull-up Revolution
item.description: I forgot to show my palms but add arrows for those as well 😩 the program I’m following is called Pull-up Revolution

item.title: What else should I add to the list?
item.description: What else should I add to the list?

item.title: Runners of all abilities put so much work into making it to the start line of a marathon, so I totally get why they want to grab all of the marathon-specific gear! I hope anyone with a connection to Boston Marathon can get a pair of these @Shokz Sports li
item.description: Runners of all abilities put so much work into making it to the start line of a marathon, so I totally get why they want to grab all of the marathon-specific gear! I hope anyone with a connection to Boston Marathon can get a pair of these @Shokz Sports li

item.title: The perils of having a body that jiggles 🙃
item.description: The perils of having a body that jiggles 🙃

item.title: Boston Marathon weekend = me running around Boston with a microphone 🎤 I’ll be recording my podcast * @Nonmembers Only * all weekend—and we’re doing a LIVE episode Sunday at Fan Fest 👀 If you listen, come say hi. If you don’t… this is your sign that you
item.description: Boston Marathon weekend = me running around Boston with a microphone 🎤 I’ll be recording my podcast * @Nonmembers Only * all weekend—and we’re doing a LIVE episode Sunday at Fan Fest 👀 If you listen, come say hi. If you don’t… this is your sign that you

item.title: Dress for the job you want, not the job you have 😌
item.description: Dress for the job you want, not the job you have 😌

item.title: This was the biggest @adidas shakeout run I’ve ever been to and somehow they didn’t lose anyone including me 😅 Also, I wanted someone to make decisions for me in the styling suite and they did because apparently a styling suite has stylists 🤭 #createdwith
item.description: This was the biggest @adidas shakeout run I’ve ever been to and somehow they didn’t lose anyone including me 😅 Also, I wanted someone to make decisions for me in the styling suite and they did because apparently a styling suite has stylists 🤭 #createdwith

item.title: I thought I was losing by a lot based on my miscalculations during mile 5 so I ran my fastest to the point of feeling sick and ended up beating Craig instead 🤭 @Craig Conover
item.description: I thought I was losing by a lot based on my miscalculations during mile 5 so I ran my fastest to the point of feeling sick and ended up beating Craig instead 🤭 @Craig Conover

item.title: First time wearing jeans to the airport.
item.description: First time wearing jeans to the airport.

item.title: Sorry in advance.
item.description: Sorry in advance.

item.title: This is a crazy start to the DICK’S Sporting Goods Varsity Team Orientation 😮 #dvtorientation #dkspartner @DICKS Sporting Goods @dicksvarsityteam
item.description: This is a crazy start to the DICK’S Sporting Goods Varsity Team Orientation 😮 #dvtorientation #dkspartner @DICKS Sporting Goods @dicksvarsityteam

item.title: This is how I was welcomed to the DICK’S Sporting Goods Varsity Team orientation 🤯🥹🤌😮‍💨 next I’ll post me crashing out trying to do my makeup this morning @dicksvarsityteam
item.description: This is how I was welcomed to the DICK’S Sporting Goods Varsity Team orientation 🤯🥹🤌😮‍💨 next I’ll post me crashing out trying to do my makeup this morning @dicksvarsityteam

item.title: I should have practiced beforehand but I’m here for three days so maybe I’ll get better. Next I will share tips on how to survive a brand trip in Tampa heat as a very sweaty person. @dicksvarsityteam
item.description: I should have practiced beforehand but I’m here for three days so maybe I’ll get better. Next I will share tips on how to survive a brand trip in Tampa heat as a very sweaty person. @dicksvarsityteam

item.title: Stay tuned for Sweaty Gal on a Yacht content @dicksvarsityteam
item.description: Stay tuned for Sweaty Gal on a Yacht content @dicksvarsityteam

item.title: I can’t wait to edit more videos of the @dicksvarsityteam Orientation, because it was unlike any brand trip for many reasons! In the meantime, here are some pictures of me with new friends and wearing outfits I worried about for no reason 🫣 I can’t believ
item.description: I can’t wait to edit more videos of the @dicksvarsityteam Orientation, because it was unlike any brand trip for many reasons! In the meantime, here are some pictures of me with new friends and wearing outfits I worried about for no reason 🫣 I can’t believ

item.title: Am I missing something?
item.description: Am I missing something?

item.title: HIIT class in the Tampa heat and humidity? This is how we survived and became the instructor’s favorites 😌 Staying on the side with shade and wearing head to toe @on were also pro moves. @dicksvarsityteam Orientation *day 3*
item.description: HIIT class in the Tampa heat and humidity? This is how we survived and became the instructor’s favorites 😌 Staying on the side with shade and wearing head to toe @on were also pro moves. @dicksvarsityteam Orientation *day 3*

item.title: Quitting is not an option but I’d be lying if I pretended I didn’t have some massive self doubt going on 😮‍💨 Week 5 of @Learn your pull-up ! 12 week plan from @Speaker | Pull-up Coach let’s go 💪
item.description: Quitting is not an option but I’d be lying if I pretended I didn’t have some massive self doubt going on 😮‍💨 Week 5 of @Learn your pull-up ! 12 week plan from @Speaker | Pull-up Coach let’s go 💪

item.title: In my defense this was after the HIIT class and Izzy was not going easy on us 🙂‍↔️ Luckily this was part of the @dicksvarsityteam orientation so we were treated like royalty with constant ice cold refreshments, shade, huge fans, cold plunges, and the mos
item.description: In my defense this was after the HIIT class and Izzy was not going easy on us 🙂‍↔️ Luckily this was part of the @dicksvarsityteam orientation so we were treated like royalty with constant ice cold refreshments, shade, huge fans, cold plunges, and the mos

item.title: Best salad of my life. I bought this @Gardyn over the winter as a very early Mother’s Day present to myself and I officially love it and the deer can’t eat any of it like they do outside 🙂‍↔️
item.description: Best salad of my life. I bought this @Gardyn over the winter as a very early Mother’s Day present to myself and I officially love it and the deer can’t eat any of it like they do outside 🙂‍↔️
🙂‍↕️

item.title: Did I do it right?
item.description: Did I do it right?

item.title: It’s shorts gobbling season and these thighs are hungry
item.description: It’s shorts gobbling season and these thighs are hungry

item.title: Training for my 5hr flight to podcast at the @Enhanced Games in Las Vegas 💪 🏋️‍♀️ My podcast 👉 @Nonmembers Only
item.description: Training for my 5hr flight to podcast at the @Enhanced Games in Las Vegas 💪 🏋️‍♀️ My podcast 👉 @Nonmembers Only

item.title: On my way to getting my first pull-up!! Let me know if you want to see the rest of the results. I repeated the same exact strength test from week 1 of the Pullup Revolution program to compare.
item.description: On my way to getting my first pull-up!! Let me know if you want to see the rest of the results. I repeated the same exact strength test from week 1 of the Pullup Revolution program to compare.

item.title: Oh and everything is bad for us and seed oils or whatever
item.description: Oh and everything is bad for us and seed oils or whatever
